residual_multiplicity.note: the 2bps headline (48.7%) is a NULL claim; CI includes 0.5 so no selection issue

confirmed: Decomposition arithmetic reproduces exactly (net -2.74c = fee -1.68 + slip -1.11 + halfspread -0.50 + sel_at_mid +0.55 on the 3,495 pool); identity check 0.00c
mid = ask - 0.5c is empirically sound: 1,588/3,495 trades matched to real decision-time books in signals.log; spread = 1c in 93.9%

Residual 4-min continuation after >=2bps first-minute drift = 48.7% CI [.468,.505]; stable on pre-trading (48.4%), trading-week (49.3%) and fresh Jul10-13 (51.1%) sub-windows; tie handling immaterial. Zero-residual-information mechanism CONFIRMED
~3.3c gross cost hurdle invariant CONFIRMED (fee 1.68 + slip 1.11 + halfspread 0.50; ~3.35c at 50c fills)
Hedge counterfactual deviation tiny: ledger vs hold-to-res model -$79 on $8.8k (0.025c/sh)
refuted_or_weakened: POSITIVE gross selection at mid (+0.55c/sh) REFUTED as stated: (a) not significant even at face value (1h-block bootstrap CI [-1.14,+2.34], p_le0=0.27); (b) sign is a survivorship artifact -- the 3,495 pool excludes 70 result=stopped trades (hold-to-res wr 0.014, imputed from cb1m, 70/70 imputable) while keeping 71 hedge-flagged trades conditioned on winning (q_sw 0.984). Restoring stopped trades: sel_at_mid = -0.48c/sh CI [-2.16,+1.26], sel_at_ask = -0.98c/sh, net -3.77c/sh, n=3,565
On the real-book matched subset (n=1,588) selection at actual mid = -0.29c CI [-3.74,+3.26] -- also ~zero, not positive
The 8bps reversal flavor (45.7%) does NOT survive Bonferroni over the K=3 thresholds searched (raw p=0.047, corrected p=0.14) and flips to 51.4% on fresh Jul10-13 (n=37). Drop it
Headline "-$8.8k pooled" understates: full settled ledger incl. stopped-trade salvage = -$11,982
"won 56.8%" mixes scopes: 58.1% on decided trades (n=2,446); 56.8% only if stopped counted as losses (n=2,504). Either way below q*=0.607 at avg fill 0.59
verdict.multiplicity_note: R5 headline claims are aggregates/nulls (no cherry-picked cells); only positive-flavored sub-claims (sel_at_mid>0, 8bps reversal) were selection-fragile and both fail; K=3 declared and honest
verdict.train_test_note: Residual analysis cannot reach the May TRAIN window (cb1m starts Jun 26) but is stable across three within-window splits incl. data the engines never saw; no post-TEST parameter choices found
